description: Add a conformal Satcom radome to the eCRM-001 fuselage. Open the baseline model at /home/ga/Documents/OpenVSP/eCRM-001_wing_tail.vsp3. Read the specification document at /home/ga/Desktop/radome_spec.txt for the precise geometry limits. In OpenVSP, add a 'Conformal' geometry component, name it 'Satcom_Radome', and ensure its Parent is set to the 'Fuselage' component. Apply the U/V limits and thickness from the spec. Save the updated model as /home/ga/Documents/OpenVSP/eCRM001_satcom.vsp3. Finally, run a CompGeom analysis to compute the new total wetted area of the aircraft, and write just the numeric Total Wetted Area value to /home/ga/Desktop/radome_report.txt.
